MOTION To Strike Portions Of The Complaint As Amended Of Plntf'S
Off Calendar Nov-21-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Peter C. Sange, Esq. & Ronald M. Toran, Esq. 650/508-1076 for pltfs & opposing parties; Christine A. Huntoon, Esq. 788-1900 for deft & moving party Theodore A. Schlink, III, LLC; David P. Wasserman, Esq. 567-9600 for Hong defts.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion to strike off calendar moot in light of ruling on demurrer.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Deft to prepare order. (See ruling on demurrer.)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Nov-21-2001 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Peter C. Sange, Esq. & Ronald M. Toran, Esq. 650/508-1076 for pltfs & opposing parties; Christine A. Huntoon, Esq. 788-1900 for deft & moving party Theodore A. Schlink, III, LLC; David P. Wasserman, Esq. 567-9600 for Hong defts.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Demurrer of Schlink to 3rd cause of action for wrongful eviction sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer to 6th cause of action wrongful eviction sustained without leave to amend as to Schlink. Demurrer to 9th cause of action intentional infliction of emotional distress sustained without leave to amend as to Schlink. Demurrer to 10th cause of action negligent infliction of emotional distress sustained without leave to amend.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Deft to prepare order.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2001 Continued To Dec-26-01 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
